member.name: T:Nahook.NahookException
member.summary: Base exception for all Nahook SDK errors.

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookApiException
member.summary: Thrown when the Nahook API returns an error response (4xx/5xx).

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookNetworkException
member.summary: Thrown when a network-level error occurs (DNS, connection refused, etc.).

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookTimeoutException
member.summary: Thrown when a request exceeds the configured timeout.

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookClient
member.summary: Ingestion client for sending webhooks via the Nahook API. Uses API keys with the nhk_ prefix.

member.name: M:Nahook.NahookClient.#ctor(System.String,Nahook.NahookClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new ingestion client.

member.name: M:Nahook.NahookClient.SendAsync(System.String,Nahook.SendOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a webhook to a specific endpoint.

member.name: M:Nahook.NahookClient.TriggerAsync(System.String,Nahook.TriggerOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Triggers an event type, delivering to all subscribed endpoints.

member.name: M:Nahook.NahookClient.SendBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Nahook.SendBatchItem},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a batch of webhooks to specific endpoints.

member.name: M:Nahook.NahookClient.TriggerBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Nahook.TriggerBatchItem},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Triggers a batch of event types.

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookClientOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:Nahook.NahookClientOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL of the Nahook API. Defaults to https://api.nahook.com.

member.name: P:Nahook.NahookClientOptions.TimeoutMs
member.summary: Request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.

member.name: P:Nahook.NahookClientOptions.Retries
member.summary: Number of retries for retryable errors. Defaults to 0.

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookManagement
member.summary: Management client for administering Nahook workspaces, endpoints, event types, etc. Uses management tokens with the nhm_ prefix.

member.name: M:Nahook.NahookManagement.#ctor(System.String,Nahook.NahookManagementOptions)
member.summary: Creates a new management client.

member.name: T:Nahook.NahookManagementOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:Nahook.NahookManagementOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL of the Nahook API. Defaults to https://api.nahook.com.

member.name: P:Nahook.NahookManagementOptions.TimeoutMs
member.summary: Request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.

member.name: T:Nahook.EndpointsResource
member.summary: Manages endpoints within a workspace.

member.name: T:Nahook.EventTypesResource
member.summary: Manages event types within a workspace.

member.name: T:Nahook.ApplicationsResource
member.summary: Manages applications within a workspace.

member.name: T:Nahook.SubscriptionsResource
member.summary: Manages subscriptions on endpoints within a workspace.

member.name: T:Nahook.PortalSessionsResource
member.summary: Creates portal sessions for applications within a workspace.
